items.name_en: 25P mini Panda🐼 color shoulder bag
items.name_cn:
25P mini Panda🐼 color shoulder bag
The mini shoulder bag fits my aesthetic perfectly. Made of lambskin with a quilted design. Features a small front pocket with no unnecessary details. Despite its small size, it fits a phone, lipstick, compact, tissues, and other small items. More importantly, it offers multiple carrying styles: backpack, shoulder bag, crossbody, handbag, etc. You can carry it however you like.
size:22*18*10cm99473

items.name_en: MiuMiu RibbonBag "Finally got my hands on this Miu Miu Ribbon bag! I have to say, the 3D bow design on the side is so cute 🎀 Not that soft and sweet cloying style, but a bit of retro Y2K sweet cool vibe. Wax leather with cracked texture paired with palladium hardware, the texture is spot on. Carried under the arm gives off a casual lady vibe, carried in hand gives a retro sweet heart vibe, the soft lambskin feel is amazing. Whether paired with a suit or a skirt, it's the perfect finishing touch.
items.name_cn:

Carried under the arm gives off a casual lady vibe, carried in hand gives a retro sweet heart vibe, the soft lambskin feel is amazing. Whether paired with a suit or a skirt, it's the perfect finishing touch.
Model: 5NE029
Dimensions: 21 x 12.5 x 9.5cm

items.name_en: 😘5BB172MiuMiu Cherry New Size Briefcase, latest two-tone design, made of top-grade imported calfskin, smooth and delicate texture, cotton satin lining. This bag is cool, capturing an exquisite multi-functional design that blends menswear and womenswear elements. Casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Extra-large capacity yet lightweight, simple yet not simplistic. The new size offers better fit; almost every fashion blogger has one.

items.name_en: MIUMIU ARCADIE Matelassé Sheepskin Medium Bag
items.name_cn:
MIUMIU ARCADIE Matelassé Sheepskin Medium Bag
Black
The long bag shape resembles a freshly baked loaf of bread, featuring the iconic Matelassé leather that is lively and cute 〰️ The body has a full, fluffy pleated texture paired with a short handle, exuding a very modern charm 〰️
Matelassé craftsmanship
Removable and adjustable long shoulder strap
Lined
Double-zipper closure
With studs
Style No.: 5BB148M1300
Size: 27*12*9cm

items.name_en: BV's new Andiamo is in stock!!️ Classic Intrecciato woven craftsmanship creates a soft bag, metal knots are micro-cast aluminum using jewelry craftsmanship 🪢, decorative beads are metal and hand-polished oak, making you switch between elegance and fun 💃, unpredictable. Classic and versatile, looks classy, and the bag has a large capacity, very convenient for daily commuting! Multiple carrying methods, adjustable strap, original sheepskin feels soft and delicate, unisex style, breaking gender boundaries, bringing a more practical and durable experience, combining elegance and casual style, the Andiamo perfectly interprets the look of "fashion old money style".
